={{ (() => { const base = $('Collect Audio Results').first().json || {}; const current = $json || {}; const metadata = base.metadata || current.metadata || {}; const directories = base.directories || current.directories || {}; return JSON.stringify({ scenes: current.scenes || base.scenes || [], syncMap: base.syncMap || current.syncMap || {}, fullVideoSubtitle: base.fullVideoSubtitle || current.fullVideoSubtitle || {}, metadata, settings: base.settings || current.settings || {}, directories, outputFilename: 'episode_' + (metadata.episodeNumber || 1) + '.mp4', videoDir: directories.video || '/data/video', width: 1080, height: 1920, fps: 24, fadeInDuration: 0.3, fadeOutDuration: 0.3, interSceneGap: 0.3, burnSubtitles: false, maxAssemblySeconds: 1800, colorEnhance: true }); })() }}
